preconditions: field_names must be a string or an iterable of strings
defaults must be None or an iterable
module must be None or a string
postconditions: returns a new subclass of tuple
the returned subclass has named fields
the named fields are based on the provided field_names
edge_cases: field_names is an empty string or an empty iterable
field_names contains duplicate field names and rename is False
defaults is provided but its length does not match the number of fields without default values

preconditions: typename must be a non-empty string
field_names must be a non-empty list of non-empty strings
defaults must be a list of values or None
module must be a module or None
postconditions: returns a new subclass of tuple with named fields
the subclass has the same fields as the input field_names
the subclass has the same default values as the input defaults
edge_cases: if typename is an empty string, raises ValueError
if field_names is an empty list, raises ValueError
if rename is not a boolean, raises TypeError
if defaults is not a list of values or None, raises TypeError
if module is not a module or None, raises TypeError

agreed.hf: typename must be a non-empty string

agreed.groq: field_names must be a string or an iterable of strings
agreed.hf: field_names must be a non-empty list of non-empty strings

agreed.groq: defaults must be None or an iterable
agreed.hf: defaults must be a list of values or None

agreed.groq: module must be None or a string
agreed.hf: module must be a module or None

agreed.groq: returns a new subclass of tuple
agreed.hf: returns a new subclass of tuple with named fields

groq_only: the returned subclass has named fields
the named fields are based on the provided field_names
hf_only: the subclass has the same fields as the input field_names
the subclass has the same default values as the input defaults

groq_only: field_names is an empty string or an empty iterable
field_names contains duplicate field names and rename is False
defaults is provided but its length does not match the number of fields without default values
hf_only: if typename is an empty string, raises ValueError
if field_names is an empty list, raises ValueError
if rename is not a boolean, raises TypeError
if defaults is not a list of values or None, raises TypeError
if module is not a module or None, raises TypeError
